## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Expo Doctor passes (`npm run doctor`)
- [ ] Website function syntax passes (`node --check website/api/contact.js`)

## Safety and release checklist

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, personal data, or private environment values are included
- [ ] User data, microphone, storage, and network behavior are unchanged or clearly documented
- [ ] New dependencies are necessary and their licenses are compatible
- [ ] SayCopy names, icons, screenshots, or other brand assets comply with `TRADEMARKS.md`
- [ ] User-facing behavior and documentation are updated where needed
